compiled_state.title: Update CLAUDE.md: add cross-epic interaction classifier to Named-agent dispatch table and Architecture section
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description
Update plugins/dso/CLAUDE.md (the project CLAUDE.md) with two documentation additions.

**1. Named-agent dispatch table** (existing table in CLAUDE.md Architecture section):
Add new row for the cross-epic interaction classifier:
| dso:cross-epic-interaction-classifier | haiku | /dso:brainstorm (cross-epic scan step — dispatched in batches of 20 open epics via cross-epic-scan.md prompt; emits interaction_signals JSON with 4-tier severity) |

**2. Architecture section** — add a new paragraph describing the cross-epic interaction scan:
Add to the Architecture section (near the brainstorm-related entries):
'**Cross-epic interaction scan**: brainstorm Phase 2 Step 2 includes a cross-epic interaction scan that classifies new epic plan overlap with all open/in-progress epics for 4 shared-resource categories (URL routes, middleware, config keys, DB tables). Severity tiers: benign, consideration (AC injected via injected provenance), ambiguity (halt with resolution options), conflict (halt with authoritative approach selection). Non-interactive sessions defer via INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED signal and interaction:deferred tag on the epic. See plugins/dso/docs/contracts/interaction-deferred-tag.md for tag lifecycle.'

## File Impact
- CLAUDE.md (MODIFY: Named-agent dispatch table + Architecture section)
